Veterans Benefits: Louisiana exempts military retirement benefits from state income tax and offers disabled-veteran property-tax exemptions, with additional assessed-value exemptions for 50%-99% service-connected disability ratings and a full remaining homestead-assessed-value exemption for qualifying 100% disabled veterans.
LGBTQSource: HRC 2024 Municipal Equality Index: Shreveport final score 62. MAP Louisiana Equality Profile: -6.75/49 Negative overall policy score.
Description: Shreveport is a northwest Louisiana regional city on the Red River with an in-city VA medical center, low typical home values, major hospital access, riverfront entertainment, arts festivals, and nearby Barksdale Air Force Base in the Shreveport-Bossier defense community. Tradeoffs include high violent-crime rates, hot humid summers, a high combined sales tax, and county-level presidential returns that are only modestly Democratic.
